title: CC narrative review S01 panel a2

payload.notes: S01 = the cover-base opening tableau on page P00_cover. Intended beat: establish deadline pressure (24h), the exhausted researcher before the hand-off, the DARK failed run she's staring at, and a preview of the ARIS duo's world. BEAT FIDELITY 5/5 — the opening is fully delivered: a lone exhausted researcher slumped in the warm study (no ARIS on stage yet, correctly deferred to S02), the cold technical window glowing with a dead failed run (RUN FAILED / exact_match=0.000 / schema_mismatch / violations: 17 / retry: 3/3), the deadline made literal as a DDL T-24:00:00 countdown chip, and the structured-decoding topic seed hanging on-screen as the unsolved thread. The warm-study vs cold-failed-window contrast carries the emotional register (tired human vs indifferent broken machine) and the steaming ML RESEARCH mug roots the temperature/atmosphere origin. COMPOSITION (STORY) 4/5 — reading order works (researcher → dead log window → DDL chip → topic seed), but the lower-left log/caption region is slightly busy and competes with the figure for first read; docked one point for that crowding. Visual identity-lock / artifact severity / baked-text legibility / content-corruption are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
